name: select
description: A custom, form-associated select with a floating listbox positioned by @floating-ui/dom; full WAI-ARIA APG listbox keyboard navigation. Submits the selected value under `name` in a plain POST form and fires native input/change events for l:model.
docs: Register <lv-select> by importing components/ui/select.ts from your entry point. Pass `options` as an array of { value, label, disabled? }. Set `name` to submit the selected value in a plain HTML form (form-associated). Bind with l:model (native input/change) or listen for lv-change.
